source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10
source.population: Patients with complaints compatible with vaginal candidiasis.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for candidiasis-compatible vaginal-discharge documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for bacterial vaginosis, STI, cervical, pelvic, postmenopausal, pregnancy, and other discharge causes.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the Dubai telehealth population and diabetes, antibiotic, estrogen, pregnancy, immunosuppression, medication, and device risk contexts.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10
source.population: Patients with complaints compatible with vaginal candidiasis.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for candidiasis-compatible vaginal-discharge documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for bacterial vaginosis, STI, cervical, pelvic, postmenopausal, pregnancy, and other discharge causes.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the Dubai telehealth population and diabetes, antibiotic, estrogen, pregnancy, immunosuppression, medication, and device risk contexts.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped candidiasis-compatible presentation, antibiotic, pregnancy, diabetes, immunosuppression, medication, and risk-context documentation.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies discharge character, itching, soreness, dyspareunia, dysuria, onset, duration, recurrence, menstrual and abnormal bleeding, pregnancy, medical, medication, and sexual history.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10
source.population: Patients with complaints compatible with vaginal candidiasis.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for candidiasis-compatible vaginal-discharge documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for bacterial vaginosis, STI, cervical, pelvic, postmenopausal, pregnancy, and other discharge causes.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies discharge character, itching, soreness, dyspareunia, dysuria, onset, duration, recurrence, menstrual and abnormal bleeding, pregnancy, medical, medication, and sexual history.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped discharge character, odor, itching, soreness, dysuria, dyspareunia, bleeding, pregnancy, medication, recurrence, and sexual-history fields.

added_items.final_wording: Lists lower abdominal pain with fever, foul-smelling or blood-stained discharge, postcoital bleeding, intermenstrual bleeding, and recent-partner context.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10
source.population: Patients with complaints compatible with vaginal candidiasis.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for candidiasis-compatible vaginal-discharge documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for bacterial vaginosis, STI, cervical, pelvic, postmenopausal, pregnancy, and other discharge causes.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists lower abdominal pain with fever, foul-smelling or blood-stained discharge, postcoital bleeding, intermenstrual bleeding, and recent-partner context.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped fever with pain, foul or blood-stained discharge, and abnormal bleeding concern prompts.

added_items.final_wording: Defines when microscopy or culture is not routine, when targeted culture is appropriate, and when pregnancy, systemic illness, atypical symptoms, recurrence, bleeding, or lower abdominal pain require face-to-face or specialist review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Vaginal Candidiasis – 10
source.population: Patients with complaints compatible with vaginal candidiasis.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines when microscopy or culture is not routine, when targeted culture is appropriate, and when pregnancy, systemic illness, atypical symptoms, recurrence, bleeding, or lower abdominal pain require face-to-face or specialist review.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports targeted swab or culture review and clinician-arranged review for atypical, persistent, recurrent, pregnancy, or systemic contexts.
